concerns.text: T018 defines the output CSV column as 'sholl_intersections' (singular) without specifying the storage of the vector of counts per radius. FR-003 requires extracting 'Sholl analysis intersection counts at defined radii' and FR-006 requires a sensitivity sweep across {2, 5, 10}µm. A single scalar column cannot support the sensitivity analysis requirement or the full FR-003 definition, creating a semantic weakening of the data contract.

T034 describes running the regression pipeline for sensitivity analysis but fails to explicitly include the dynamic PCA/VIF check (T026) within the loop. FR-004 mandates calculating VIF and applying PCA if VIF > 5.0 for *all* predictors. If collinearity varies across Sholl radius steps (changing the input features), skipping the VIF re-calculation in the loop violates the requirement to ensure orthogonal predictors for every regression run.

T024 implements 'Early AD' classification using only amyloid-beta load. FR-010 explicitly requires classifying based on amyloid-beta load OR 'the presence of specific tau pathology markers'. The task lacks the conditional logic to check for and utilize tau markers if amyloid-beta data is absent, silently relaxing the spec's fallback mechanism.

T010a is marked 'Conditional' and skips validation if real annotations are unavailable. SC-001 in the spec requires measuring extraction accuracy against a 'manually annotated subset of images'. While the plan acknowledges data blocking, the task's logic to 'skip' rather than 'fail' or 'block' the pipeline when the specific SC-001 reference data is missing weakens the success criterion's enforcement in the implementation phase.
